creator: Joerg.Pulz@frm2.tum.de
text:
This module provides the mod_auth_basic authentication front-end a way
	to authenticate users by checking credentials via the Cyrus SASL
	library. This may be interesting for setups where other daemons (e.g.
	for SMTP, IMAP or LDAP) already running at a machine use SASL to
	authenticate users.

	See http://mod-authn-sasl.sourceforge.net/ for configuration details.
